name: rapp-zoo
summary: Local-first Pokédex of digital organisms — drag-drop import / export / inspect / discover. Runs alongside your brainstem at localhost:7070.
_note: Tool-kind entry — the zoo is a standalone Flask app, not a single-agent rapplication that hatches into a brainstem. Has skin (its own UI), has identity (rappid declared here), but installs via its own one-liner rather than a 2.2-rapplication egg. Future work: refactor into a brainstem organ + rapp-ui so it can ship as a real .egg cartridge.
